title: A7MD's Better Swords
description: A resource pack that changes how swords look like
body:
A Resource pack that changes the way swords look like
for Example:

**Netherite sword**
**Diamond Sword**
**Golden Sword**
**Iron Sword**
**Stone Sword**
**Wooden Sword**
![All Sword Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d7d0750f7d51d24de80d0cd5fb376b1ca2da423.png)
